历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 27355 → 16885 → 3331 → 12146 → 11493, showing a trend of sharp fluctuations followed by stabilization. After an abnormal forward shift in 2023 (3331), the ranking significantly moved back to 12146 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 11493 in 2025, with the baseline range in recent two years around 11493–12146. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Yunnan Province was 71 in 2021, 81 in 2022, 82 in 2023, 85 in 2024, and 84 in 2025, showing a slow expansion trend. However, the 2026 plan sharply drops to 58, a reduction of about 31% compared to 2025, the lowest in the past six years, which will significantly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 25th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (stable at 24–26 from 2021 to 2025), belonging to the top tier of national universities, with sustained strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.
4. [Reputation Heat] In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety (voyeurism and theft), school management responses, and abnormal signals of admission gaps. Douyin heat ranks 5th overall (high heat), with extremely high comprehensive exposure. Abnormal signals in 2025 enrollment indicate a continuous deterioration since 2017, with declines in both high and low score segments. Negative reputation coexists with high heat exposure, creating complex effects on application psychology. Xiamen University has 14 A- or above disciplines, including top-level Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, and Statistics A+. Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Ecology A and other disciplines are strong. Mathematics A-, Law A-, Theoretical Economics A- and other disciplines are also competitive, highly related to Physics Category majors such as Mathematics, Chemistry, Statistics, Economics, and Computer Science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other science and engineering majors have been continuously highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social application heat. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 229,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, intensifying competition across the province. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province (not the home province), with no special regional preference advantage in Yunnan. In 2025, its Physics Category enrollment in Yunnan accounted for about 2.23% (84/3764, estimated), a moderately low level, requiring consideration of regional distance factors for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11493, the significant 31% reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (intensified competition), the approximately 32% increase in local Physics Category candidates (further intensified competition), the negative reputation that may suppress some application willingness but high Douyin heat maintains attention, and the sustained appeal of advantageous disciplines to high-scoring candidates, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move significantly forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 9259, range 8759–9759.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for Physics Category is approximately 9259, range 8759–9759. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 8500 aim for Tier 1 majors such as Engineering Experimental Class (Nanqiang Academy Excellence Leading Class), Mathematics, and Computer Science as a sprint; candidates with rankings between 9000–10000 target Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information, Physics, and Chemistry as the main force; candidates with rankings above 10000 use Science Experimental Class (Life Sciences) as a safety option. Xiamen University's Physics Category enrollment in 2026 sharply reduces to 58, making competition extremely intense. It is advised to reasonably assess ranking compatibility.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 4024 → 2268 → 347 → 2056 → 3165, showing overall drastic fluctuations. After an abnormal advance to rank 347 in 2023, it significantly retreated to 2056 in 2024, and further retreated to 3165 in 2025, with a continuous retreat trend in the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3165. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Yunnan Province was 24 in 2021, 22 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 26 in 2025, generally stable with a slight increase. However, the 2026 plan sharply drops to only 4, a reduction of about 84.6% compared to 2025, the lowest in history, leading to extremely intense competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety, school management responses, and abnormal signals of admission cutoffs. Douyin heat ranking is 5th overall (high heat), with extremely high comprehensive exposure. Abnormal signals in 2025 enrollment indicate a continuous deterioration of admissions. Negative reputation may cause some students to hesitate, but the 985 level combined with high heat exposure still maintains high attention. Xiamen University's advantageous disciplines related to History Category include: Law A-, Sociology A-, Theoretical Economics A-, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, etc., highly correlated with majors like Public Administration and Marxist Theory in History Category admissions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major from 2024 to 2026 shows a divided wait-and-see attitude (both recommended and discouraged), Chinese Language/Literature major recommendation heat is slightly hot. The estimated number of History Category students in 2026 is about 148,900, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, intensifying competition across the province. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, with no special regional preference in Yunnan Province. In 2025, its enrollment share in Yunnan's History Category is about 0.72% (26/3615, estimated), a relatively low level, and cross-province application requires considering geographical distance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3165, the extreme enrollment reduction of 84.6% in 2026 (only 4 spots, sharply intensified competition), a 32% increase in local History Category students (further intensified competition), negative reputation possibly suppressing some willingness to apply but the 985 level maintaining high appeal, and the sustained attraction of advantageous disciplines to high-scoring liberal arts students, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly advance compared to 2025 (extremely difficult to enter). Predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1528, with a range of 1328–1728.

- Marxist Theory.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 1528, with a range of 1328–1728. Since Xiamen University only recruits 4 students in Yunnan's History Category in 2026 (3 in Public Administration, 1 in Marxist Theory), competition is extremely fierce. It is recommended that students with rankings within 1300 can attempt to apply; students with rankings above 1500 should carefully evaluate and consider other 985 universities' History Category as main targets. Among the two majors, Public Administration has slightly more enrollment (3 spots) and can be prioritized.
